# auto-geo

> The open-source GEO engine that gets your brand mentioned in ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Grok. A CLI that audits, generates, fixes, and tracks the pages large language models cite. Open-source (MIT), built by Shadow.

`auto-geo` is a command-line GEO engine. It encodes the structural and quality patterns empirically linked to higher AI-engine citation rates — TL;DR capsules, question-format H2 headings, answer-first paragraphs, dense entity references, FAQ schema, and a rigid seven-block page architecture — into one workflow: `doctor` audits any URL for citation readiness, `write` generates publish-ready pages from target queries, `fix` rewrites existing pages, `check` measures whether AI engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Grok) actually cite your domain, and `history` trends that coverage over time. State is file-based and committable: tracked prompts in `.auto-geo/prompts.txt`, every check run saved to `.auto-geo/checks/`. Built by [Shadow](https://www.shadow.inc) — a media research lab building the next generation of AI-powered media intelligence and communications technology, in partnership with the teams that put OpenAI, TikTok, Meta, Amazon, and Lovable on the map.

## Concept

- [What is a GEO resource page?](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/concept.md): the page architecture this engine enforces
- [GEO SOP](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/sop.md): the standard operating procedure behind every schema constraint
- [Page architecture](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): the seven mandatory blocks
- [Validation reference](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/validation.md): hard rejects vs. soft warnings

## CLI

- [README](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo#readme): quickstart and the full workflow
- [init](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/init.md): one-shot setup — config, .env.local, .auto-geo workspace
- [doctor](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/doctor.md): audit any URL or sitemap for citation readiness
- [write](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/write.md): generate publish-ready pages from target queries
- [fix](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/fix.md): LLM rewrite of an existing page
- [prompts](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/prompts.md): manage the tracked prompt set
- [check](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/check.md): measure citation coverage across AI engines
- [history](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/docs/history.md): citation coverage over time
- [AGENT.md](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/AGENT.md): operating spec for coding agents driving the CLI

## Optional

- [Full LLM-ingestible bundle](https://github.com/shadowresearch/auto-geo/blob/main/llms-full.txt): README + concept + SOP + architecture + validation inlined in one file

- [About Shadow](https://www.shadow.inc)
